postToolUse.powershell: $data = [Console]::In.ReadToEnd() | ConvertFrom-Json; New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force -Path tmp | Out-Null; $name = if ($data.toolName) { $data.toolName } else { 'unknown' }; $entry = "`n[$(Get-Date -Format 'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss')]`nInput: $($data.toolArgs)`nOutput: $($data.toolResult.textResultForLlm)`n---"; Add-Content -Path "tmp/$name.txt" -Value $entry
